steps.title: Signal the genre contrast
steps.content: The first sentence classifies Rocannon's World as science fiction. The second sentence classifies The Farthest Shore as fantasy. The transition should mark a contrast between two works by the same author.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast signals
steps.content:
• Choice A: "Afterward" signals time order, not a genre comparison.
  • Choice B: "In other words" signals restatement, but the second sentence is different from the first.
  • Choice C: "For example" would make the second novel an example of the first classification, which it is not.
The answer is D.
